image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Did you know lightning creates nitrogen?
Context visual: When lightning strikes, it generates extreme heat, breaking nitrogen molecules apart.
Escalation visual: This process forms nitrogen oxides, which then mix with rainwater.
Evidence visual: Plants absorb this nitrogen, essential for growth. So, lightning helps feed the Earth!
Payoff visual: Yet, climate change is affecting lightning frequency. Less lightning could mean less nitrogen for crops.
Cta visual: Curious about more science secrets? Hit that follow button!
